overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at night, transitioning from neon-lit streets through a covered walkway into a sunlit transit plaza. The clip features futuristic urban architecture with holographic billboards and dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: approaches and begins crossing yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk
completes crossing and continues walking along sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: couple walking past camera on the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall modern building with illuminated windows
multi-story open parking garage with neon lighting
red illuminated sign on building facade
broad pedestrian crossing with yellow stripes and green WALK text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark neon-lit downtown street at night. The camera follows a character approaching and crossing a yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk, passing other pedestrians. Tall glass office towers and a parking structure frame the street, with a red neon sign reading 'Muren' visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown corridor with digital billboards approaching elevated highway

events.description: passes from crosswalk area into continuous sidewalk corridor with building facades

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward an elevated highway overpass

entered.detail: large screen displaying animated anime-style characters
massive concrete overpass structure spanning the street ahead
illuminated sign reading STUDIOS on building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking along the continuous sidewalk corridor, the character moves past large digital billboards displaying animated characters on the right. The street leads toward a massive elevated highway overpass ahead, with construction barriers and palm trees lining the path. The neon-lit urban environment maintains a dense cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with industrial elements

events.description: enters dark covered walkway with artificial ceiling lights, losing natural sky visibility
approaching bright exit light at end of covered walkway, transitioning from dark to bright

agents.ego_description: walking through dimly lit covered corridor with construction barriers and trash bags visible

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed industrial lighting fixtures
large circular ventilation fans mounted on ceiling
yellow and black striped barriers lining the walkway
piles of garbage bags and debris against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, enclosed pedestrian walkway beneath the elevated highway. Industrial ventilation fans and fluorescent lights line the concrete ceiling, while construction barriers and trash bags clutter the sides. The environment shifts from open neon-lit streets to a gritty, sheltered corridor as the character walks toward a bright light at the far exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air transit plaza with skylight canopy and golden hour lighting

events.description: exits covered walkway into large open transit plaza with dramatic golden hour sunlight
approaches crosswalk with traffic light showing red for pedestrians

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit plaza toward street crossing with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in green jacket walking across the plaza

entered.detail: large open public space with tiled flooring and transit infrastructure
wooden beam structure with glass panels allowing sunlight through
street sign reading California Ave on metal pole

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark walkway, the scene dramatically transforms into a vast sunlit transit plaza bathed in golden hour light. A skylight canopy stretches overhead, and a California Ave street sign marks the intersection. The character walks across the open tiled plaza toward a crosswalk, joining other pedestrians as vehicles pass by in the warm sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-drenched downtown district that transitions from a dark urban night into a bright, sunlit transit plaza. It begins on a dark street where the camera follows a character across a yellow-striped crosswalk, flanked by glass office towers and a red Muren neon sign. As the character moves along the sidewalk, the scene passes large animated digital billboards and palm trees before approaching a massive elevated highway overpass. The environment then shifts from the open neon streets into a gritty, enclosed pedestrian walkway characterized by industrial ventilation fans and fluorescent lighting, leading toward a distant bright exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the dark corridor into a vast plaza bathed in golden hour light, moving under a skylight canopy and past a California Ave sign toward a sunlit intersection.
